# Authoring Templates

This directory contains authoring templates for use when creating new assets.

## Available Templates

| Template | Use |
|----------|-----|
| `benchmark.template.yml` | New benchmark question |
| `example_sql.template.yml` | New example SQL entry |
| `filter_snippet.template.yml` | New filter snippet |
| `measure_snippet.template.yml` | New measure snippet |
| `column_metadata.template.yml` | Column metadata file |
